NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This Non-Disclosure Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into as of October 5, 2023, by Dr. Emily Tan (NRIC: S9876543H) of 123 Orchard Road, Singapore 238890, and TechVision Pte Ltd (UEN: T12LL3456L) with its registered office at 456 Raffles Place, Singapore 048619.

1. Confidential Information. The parties agree to disclose certain confidential information ("Confidential Information") solely for the purpose of evaluating potential business opportunities. Confidential Information shall include, but is not limited to, business plans, financial data, and project status updates. However, this does not include any information that is publicly known or becomes publicly available without breach of this Agreement.

2. Obligations of the Recipient. The Recipient agrees to keep all Confidential Information in strict confidence and shall not disclose such information to any third party without prior written consent from the Discloser. The Recipient shall use the same standard of care to protect the Confidential Information as it uses to protect its own confidential information, but in no event less than reasonable care. The Recipient shall not use the Confidential Information for any purpose other than evaluating the business opportunity contemplated by this Agreement.

Contact Information:
Phone: +65 6123 4567
Email: emily.tan@techvision.sg

For avoidance of doubt, this Agreement does not constitute a project plan or guarantee any project status updates. Further, the parties acknowledge that this Agreement is not an SPA, and any financial commitments, including the hypothetical SGD 500,000 consideration, are subject to separate agreements. Visit https://example.sg/user/S9876543H for more information.
